Name: Home Building Compensation Fund
Description: HBCF provides a safety net for home owners in NSW faced with incomplete and defective building work carried out by a builder or tradesperson, and is required on all jobs valued over $20,000. The cost is calculated on the total of construction costs.

Name: Buildern Project Management
Description:
We use Buildern as our project management software
 This gives you access to the client portal where you can view the project information, schedule & site diaries

Name: Hazardco Site Safety Software
Description: We use Hazardco as our site safety hub to ensure all works are performed with complete safety in mind

Name: Supervision
Description: A job is only as good as the supervision it gets during construction. We pride ourselves on keeping up to date with all current industry rules and regulations, which we then make sure all our carpenters and contractors adhere to. All our projects, no matter how big or small all get constant supervision by our team, every single element is checked and passed by our stringent quality control measures.

Name: Skip Bin

If suitable access is unavailable, then rubbish will be contained in a suitable area and collected in a truck to be taken to the dump.
